---
title: "Blog"
description: "Articles and tutorials on data science, machine learning, engineering, and sustainable systems."
page-layout: full
toc: false
listing:
  contents:
    - "classification_vs_clustering.qmd"
  type: default
  sort: "date desc"
  categories: true
  fields: [title, author, date, description, categories]
---

```{=html}
<div class="page-hero">
  <h1 data-aos="fade-up">Blog</h1>
  <p data-aos="fade-up" data-aos-delay="100">Tutorials, deep dives, and lessons from building real systems.</p>
</div>
```
